records.name: Wyandotte-Leavenworth Area Agency on Aging (AAA 01)
records.notes: Agency is run by the Unified Government of Wyandotte County/Kansas City. Address (849 N 47th St, Ste C, Kansas City, KS 66112) and phone (913-573-8531; toll-free 1-888-661-1444) confirmed via WebSearch of the official wycokck.org listing and corroborated by seniorsbluebook.com. Services confirmed: congregate + home-delivered meals (food), senior ride/curb-to-curb transportation (gas_transport), and Information & Assistance/referral plus case management (navigation). The official wycokck.org pages and KDADS AAA list returned HTTP 403 to automated WebFetch (CDN/edge block, not a robots disallow), so confirmation came from search snippets of those official pages plus a corroborating third-party directory. No email address was published on the public pages reviewed.
verify_issues: No issues with address, phone, counties, or website. All fields corroborated by official wycokck.org and multiple third-party directories.
Phone 913-573-8531 is a valid US format with a legitimate Kansas City, KS area code (913); toll-free 1-888-661-1444 also valid.
Address 849 N 47th Street, Suite C, Kansas City, KS 66112 is a real KS location; ZIP 66112 correctly disambiguates to the Kansas side of Kansas City.
Both counties served (Wyandotte, Leavenworth) are real Kansas counties and match the agency's actual service area.
Website (wycokck.org, Unified Government of Wyandotte County/Kansas City) correctly matches the agency.
Minor: email is null, which appropriately matches the stated absence of a published email; confidence 'high' is justified for the verified fields.

records.name: Central Plains Area Agency on Aging (AAA 02)
records.notes: PSA/AAA 02, based in Wichita. Counties (Sedgwick, Butler, Harvey) confirmed by multiple sources incl. Sedgwick County .gov. Toll-free: 1-800-367-7298. robots.txt on cpaaa.org disallows ClaudeBot/AI crawlers, so address/phone/email taken from a single non-automated WebFetch of the public contact page and cross-checked against search snippets; no further automated crawling performed. KDADS .gov AAA page returned HTTP 403 (could not directly confirm). Services inferred from AAA role: funds home-delivered/congregate meals (food), info & referral/options counseling (navigation), and senior transportation (gas_transport). Note: per a Sedgwick County news release, CPAAA services are transitioning to a provider named Everfull effective Jan 1, 2026 — verify current operating entity/contact before publishing.
verify_issues: Service transition risk (not a fabrication): record's own notes state CPAAA services were transitioning to a provider named 'Everfull' effective Jan 1, 2026. Today is 2026-06-24, so the contact entity may have changed. The address/phone/email were re-confirmed on https://www.cpaaa.org/contact and still match, but the current operating entity should be re-verified before publishing.

confidence='high' is slightly aggressive given the unresolved Everfull transition and that KDADS .gov returned HTTP 403 (could not be used as an independent .gov cross-check); 'medium' would be more defensible until the operating entity is confirmed.

All 18 counties confirmed on agency homepage and services pages, matching the planning service area. Services: congregate + home-delivered MEALS (food) and Information & Assistance / referral, SHICK, options/case management (navigation) explicitly listed on https://nwkaaa.com/services/. Transportation (gas_transport) not explicitly itemized on the agency's own services page; it is a standard OAA-funded AAA service and referenced generally in third-party/state sources, so included but unverified on-site. Email nwkaaa@nwkaaa.org came from a third-party aggregator (Rooks County gov page), NOT the agency's own contact page — treat as lower-confidence and verify before use.

Transportation (gas_transport) is not explicitly itemized on the agency's services page; it is inferred as a standard OAA service. Included but unverified on-site.
Minor cosmetic: agency renders its own name as 'NorthWest Kansas Area Agency on Aging' (camelCase) on its site; record uses 'Northwest'. Not a substantive issue.

records.name: Jayhawk Area Agency on Aging
records.notes: Robots.txt checked: site allows crawling (only blocks lightbox params, ad-bot partials, PetalBot). Office address + phone + email confirmed from /contact page. Services confirmed: food (CHAMPSS, home-delivered & congregate meals, KS Senior Farmers Market Nutrition Program); navigation (information & referral, case management, Medicare assistance, options counseling, legal services); gas_transport (transportation listed as available assistance). Agency "Helping Older Adults since 1976."

records.name: Southeast Kansas Area Agency on Aging (AAA 05)
records.notes: Robots.txt allows crawling of / (only Disallow: *?lightbox= and PetalBot blocked). Main office: 1 W. Ash St., Chanute, KS 66720; phone 620-431-2980 / 1-800-794-2440. Branch offices: Coffeyville (618 S. Union St., 67337, 620-251-7313) and Pittsburg (3003 N. Joplin St., 66762, 620-232-5944), per sekaaa.com/reach-out. Services: nutrition (60+ Nutrition / 60+ Dine = food), transportation (gas_transport, standard AAA service), and Medicare/SHICK assistance & info-and-referral (navigation). Email not listed on agency's own pages (a third-party snippet suggested seksaaa@sekaaa.com but not confirmed on official site), so nulled.

records.name: Southwest Kansas Area Agency on Aging

Services inferred as standard AAA offerings (home-delivered/congregate meals, senior transportation, information & referral/options counseling). Note an alternate agency site exists at swkaaa.org.

Minor: an alternate/legacy agency domain 'swkaaa.org' also exists (appears in search results and KDADS-style listings); the primary 'swkaaa-aging.org' is correct but a reader could be confused by the duplicate sites.

Services ['food','gas_transport','navigation'] are inferred as 'standard AAA offerings' per the notes rather than individually confirmed from a services page; confidence in the services bucket is lower than for contact/county fields, though they are typical for an AAA.

records.name: East Central Kansas Area Agency on Aging (AAA 07)
records.notes: Office address (117 S Main, Ottawa, KS 66067) and phone confirmed from contact page; counties (Anderson, Coffey, Franklin, Linn, Miami, Osage) confirmed from homepage. records.name: North Central-Flint Hills Area Agency on Aging (AAA 08)
records.notes: Office address (401 Houston Street, Manhattan, KS 66502), toll-free phone (800-432-2703), and email confirmed on the Contact page. Counties confirmed from the agency's own homepage, which lists 18 counties: Chase, Clay, Cloud, Dickinson, Ellsworth, Geary, Jewell, Lincoln, Lyon, Marion, Mitchell, Morris, Ottawa, Pottawatomie, Republic, Riley, Saline, Wabaunsee. NOTE: The orchestrator's counties hint differs from the agency's actual service area — the hint included McPherson and Rice (which are NOT served by this AAA; they belong to a neighboring AAA) and omitted Lyon. I used the agency's own published list. Services confirmed on /services page: 'Friendship Meals' home-delivered and congregate dining (food); extensive info & referral / options counseling via Answers for Older Kansans (AOK), SHICK Medicare counseling, caregiver support, resource guides (navigation). Senior TRANSPORTATION (gas_transport) was NOT explicitly listed on the pages reviewed, so it is omitted from services pending confirmation, though AAAs commonly offer or coordinate it. Satellite offices: Salina (245 N 9th, Salina, KS 67401) and Emporia (221 W Logan Ave, Emporia, KS 66801). robots.txt blocks AI-specific crawlers (ClaudeBot/anthropic-ai) but the general '*' agent is allowed on content pages (/contact, /services); only /config, /search, /api, /static disallowed.
verify_issues: Minor: transportation (gas_transport) is not listed in services, which the notes correctly flag as unconfirmed/omitted pending verification — not an error, just an incomplete services bucket.

The contact page itself does not list counties; the 18-county list is sourced from the homepage (confirmed). Source_url points to /contact, but county evidence comes from the homepage — a slight source-attribution mismatch worth noting, though both are the agency's own site.

records.name: Area Agency on Aging, Region X (Region 10)

FOOD confirmed: congregate meals (M-F lunch) and home-delivered/Meals on Wheels. NAVIGATION confirmed: information & referral, general Medicare and new-to-Medicare counseling, Extra Help/Medicare Savings Program screening, caregiver support, ombudsman, legal aid referral. GAS_TRANSPORT (senior transportation) NOT explicitly listed on the agency's own website; left out of services to avoid guessing per facts-only rule, though AAAs typically offer it — recommend confirming directly. verify_issues: No issues affecting plausibility. Phone 417-781-7562 is a valid US format (417 is a legitimate SW Missouri area code) and is corroborated by independent third-party listings (Chamber of Commerce, AgingCare).
Address 531 E. 15th St., Joplin, MO 64804 is consistent: 64804 is a valid Joplin ZIP and matches the Chamber of Commerce listing for this agency.

All four counties (Barton, Jasper, Newton, McDonald) are real Missouri counties in the state's southwest corner and are explicitly confirmed as the service area by the agency and multiple sources ('serving Barton, Jasper, Newton, and McDonald counties since 1979'). No corrections needed.
Website aaaregionx.org matches the agency; 'Region X' and 'Region Ten/10' are used interchangeably by the agency, so the name is accurate.

MINOR (not plausibility-affecting): gas_transport was correctly omitted per facts-only rule, but verification could not confirm or rule out senior transportation from the agency site; flag for follow-up. The 'no public email' / 404 /contact note is plausible but unverified in this check.
